markets.rules_primary: If Miami Heretics wins map 4 in the Call of Duty League Stage 4 Major 2026: Miami Heretics vs. Carolina Royal Ravens Call of Duty match originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026 at 1:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.

markets.title: Will Carolina Royal Ravens win map 4 in the Miami Heretics vs. Carolina Royal Ravens match?

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 26, 2026 6 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 90.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 90.99° on Jun 26, 2026 at 6pm EDT?
